name: Espresso Martini

spec.method_detail: Shake very hard with ice — the vigorous shake creates the foam. Double strain into chilled coupe.

history: Dick Bradsell created the Espresso Martini (originally 'Vodka Espresso') in 1983 at the Soho Brasserie in London. According to legend, a young supermodel asked him for something to 'wake me up and then f*** me up.' Bradsell had an espresso machine behind the bar and improvised. Three coffee beans represent health, wealth, and happiness — a nod to the Italian espresso tradition.
